notes: game runs flawless even in ultrawide if you uninstall Mono from the Proton prefix & install dotnet40. steps: [1: install Winetricks & Protontricks to your system. google it if you don't know how] [2: uninstall Mono. run: WINEPREFIX=path-to-steam/steamapps/compatdata/57650/pfx/ path-to-steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.11/dist/bin/wine64 uninstaller] [3: set mscoree.dll to native only. run: protontricks 57650 winecfg] [4: install dotnet40. run: protontricks 57650 dotnet40]
